prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约3488→3389→3655→3468→3114，近5年整体在3100–3700区间波动；2025年基准约3114名，较2024年普通类3468名明显前移（位 次数字减小），显示报考热度回升；本省理科/物理类计划2021年77人、2022年76人、2023年77人、2024年76人、2025年82人；2026年计划93人，较2025 年扩招约13.4%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第54名持续上升至2026年第50名，首次进入全国前50，学校 综合实力和声誉稳步提升；2026年声誉评价未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第64位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等，未出现高热助推或负面冲击；历史无 投档断档记录，报考心理稳定；信息与通信工程A+（全国顶尖）、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A-、网络空间安全A-、软件工程A-，共6个A类学科，信 息通信领域实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类2024年高热推荐，计算机类推荐，均为北邮核心专业方向，社会热度高；本省2026年物理类考生约26.8万人，较2025年26.6万人略增约0.8%；北京邮电大 学位于北京（非本省），university_home_province为北京；江西省考生报考北京高校存在一定地域偏好，北京区位优势对高分考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年 位次前移趋势、2026年扩招13.4%对竞争的缓解、软科排名首次进入前50带来的层次提升、以及电子信息/计算机类专业持续高热，预计2026年最低位次在2025年3114名基础上小幅 后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约3385名，区间2885–3885名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（元班）（计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全、具身智能）
- 电子信息类（元班）（通信工程、电子科学与技术、低空技术与工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、网络工程、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 通信工程（大类招生）
- 电子信息类（电子科学与技术、电子信息科学与技术、光电信息科学与工程、集成电路设计与集成系统）
- 人工智能（大类招生）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 自动化类（智能机器人）（自动化、机器人工程、机械工程（数字智能））
- 网络空间安全（大类招生）
- 软件工程。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2885–3885名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（计算机类、通信工程、电子信息类），一档元班专业作为冲刺（需位次明显优于区间下限），三档专业作为稳妥保 底。北邮在信息通信领域学科优势突出，计算机与电子信息类专业社会热度持续高位，报考时建议优先选择与A类学科直接相关的专业方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 3488 → 3389 → 3655 → 3468 → 3114, fluctuating within the 3100–3700 range over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 3114, significantly moving forward (ranking number decreasing) compared to the 2024 regular category of 3468, indicating a rebound in application popularity; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 77 in 2021, 76 in 2022, 77 in 2023, 76 in 2024, and 82 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 93, an increase of about 13.4% over 2025, a relatively large expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 54th in 2021 to 50th in 2026, entering the national top 50 for the first time, with continuously improving comprehensive strength and reputation; no significant negative public opinion in the 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin popularity ranking 64th (rated 'average'), with moderate short video exposure, no high heat boost or negative impact; no history of admission gaps, stable application psychology; Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top nationally), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Cyberspace Security A-, Software Engineering A-, a total of 6 A-class disciplines, with outstanding strength in information and communication fields, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024, Computer majors recommended, both core professional directions of BUPT with high social popularity; the province's 2026 physics category examinees are about 268,000, a slight increase of about 0.8% from 266,000 in 2025; Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing (not the home province), university_home_province is Beijing; Jiangxi examinees have a certain regional preference for applying to Beijing universities, and Beijing's location advantage continues to attract high-scoring students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of the 2025 ranking, the alleviation of competition from the 13.4% expansion in 2026, the level improvement from Soft Science ranking entering the top 50 for the first time, and the sustained high popularity of electronic information/computer majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward (ranking number increasing) from the 2025 baseline of 3114, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 3385, and a range of 2885–3885.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Class (Yuan Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Embodied Intelligence)
- Electronic Information Class (Yuan Class) (Communication Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Low-Altitude Technology and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Network Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Communication Engineering (Major Category Enrollment)
- Electronic Information Class (Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems)
- Artificial Intelligence (Major Category Enrollment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Automation Class (Intelligent Robots) (Automation, Robot Engineering, Mechanical Engineering (Digital Intelligence))
- Cyberspace Security (Major Category Enrollment)
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2885–3885, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Class, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 Yuan Class majors as a sprint (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. BUPT has outstanding disciplinary advantages in information and communication fields, and computer and electronic information majors maintain high social popularity. When applying, it is recommended to prioritize major directions directly related to A-class disciplines.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1458 → 1507 → 1506 → 1732 → 1395. Over the past five years, the overall fluctuation range is 1390–1740. The 2025 baseline is about 1395, a significant improvement from 2024's 1732 (ranking number decreased), returning to a recent high. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 12 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 13 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 13, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university. The Soft Science main ranking has risen from 54th in 2021 to 50th in 2026, entering the national top 50 for the first time, reflecting steady improvement in overall strength and reputation. Information and Communication Engineering is A+, Computer Science and Technology is A, etc. Although primarily focused on science and engineering, the overall level enhancement of the university also has a driving effect on liberal arts programs. In 2026, there is no significant negative public opinion in reputation evaluation. Douyin popularity ranking is 64th (rated as 'average'), with moderate exposure. There is no record of enrollment gaps in history, and the application psychology is stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Network and New Media, English, Business Administration), Law in 2024 showed differentiation and wait-and-see attitude, with moderate popularity. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is about 207,000, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 2025's 206,000. Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing (not in the home province), with university_home_province being Beijing. Jiangxi examinees have some regional preference for applying to Beijing universities, and Beijing's location advantage is also attractive to liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound of 2025 rankings to a recent high, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the level effect from Soft Science ranking improvement, and a slight increase in the total number of history category examinees, it is expected that the 2026 minimum ranking will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases) from the 2025 baseline of 1395. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1425, with a range of 1211–1639.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (Joint Degree with China University of Political Science and Law)
- Network and New Media.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (Digital Intelligence Management Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: BUPT has few liberal arts enrollment majors (only 4). Within the predicted ranking range of 1211–1639, it is recommended to target Law (Joint Degree) and Network and New Media as reach goals, English as a safe choice, and Business Administration as a safety. The Law Joint Degree has cross-university training advantages and deserves special attention.
